svg.title: Per-question audio loop
svg.desc: Five-step loop for each qualification question: QuestionFlow reads prompt, MOSS-TTS synthesises ulaw, Asterisk plays on call, STTClient streams to Deepgram, QuestionFlow classifies intent and branches to advance, reprompt, or transfer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does QuestionFlow load questions.spec.yaml at runtime and pick the right question?')
sendPrompt('How does the MOSS-TTS LRU cache and pre-warming work?')
g.text: LRU cache → HTTP POST → ulaw buffer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the WebSocket send ulaw audio to Asterisk and what format does the lead hear?')
g.text: ulaw stream on call → lead hears

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does STTClient stream 160-byte ulaw frames to Deepgram in real time?')
sendPrompt('How does QuestionFlow.classify() map transcript text to an intent and decide the next state?')
sendPrompt('What does the AI say when a lead is disqualified on Q1?')
sendPrompt('How does the state advance from Q1 to Q2 to Q3 and then to the transfer?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the silence timeout is exceeded — how does transfer-anyway work?')
